query: Anthropic API new feature tool use 2026

results.title: Anthropic Release Notes - May 2026 Latest Updates - Releasebot
results.description: Original source ... Anthropic launches Claude for Small Business, bringing Claude into tools like QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, Docusign, Google Workspace, and Microsoft 365 with ready-to-run workflows for payroll, invoicing, sales, marketing, and month-end close.

results.title: Claude Updates by Anthropic - May 2026 - Releasebot
results.description: Claude releases the Claude Platform on AWS, bringing the full Claude API feature set to AWS customers with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. It adds managed agents, code execution, web tools, skills, prompt caching, and new models, all available today.

results.title: Claude Code Updates by Anthropic - May 2026 - Releasebot
results.description: Fixed /model picker "Default" row not reflecting ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL/ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL overrides · Fixed spurious "stream idle timeout" 5 minutes after a response completed, caused by the watchdog timer not being cleared on stream cancellation · Fixed ToolSearch missing MCP tools that connected after session start in nonblocking mode · Fixed !exit / !quit in bash mode terminating the CLI instead of running as a shell command · Fixed images sent to newer models being resized to 2576px per side instead of the correct 2000px maximum

results.title: Claude Buddy: Anthropic April Fools Terminal Tamagotchi
results.description: Claude Buddy is a virtual pet companion built into Claude Code, Anthropic's terminal-based AI coding assistant. It works like a tamagotchi that lives in your terminal and reacts to your development sessions.

results.title: Claude Code Changelog: All Release Notes (2026)
results.description: Bare mode - Added --bare flag for scripted -p calls that skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks; requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or apiKeyHelper via --settings · Channels permission relay - Added --channels permission relay so channel servers can forward tool approval prompts to your phone
